title: Advance
description: A digital agency focused on SMBs, where I integrated advertising design, audiovisual content, organic strategy and paid media for more than 50 commercial accounts.
challenge: Serving more than 50 SMB accounts with very different design, content and media needs, while keeping quality and delivery times consistent in a remote work environment.
objective: Integrate advertising design, audiovisual content, organic strategy and paid media into a single workflow, aligning every deliverable with each account's commercial goals.
role: Advertising Designer, Media Buyer and Account Manager: I coordinated the creative flow of a seven-person team — from brief to creation, review and approval of deliverables — and advised clients directly.
strategy: Build repeatable processes for content production, quality control and deliverable organization, and plan campaigns on Meta Ads, Google Ads and TikTok Ads with segmentation and KPI analysis.

process.title: Brief & diagnosis
process.description: Per-account briefs: commercial goals, audience, and content and media needs.

process.title: Production & quality control
process.description: Creative team coordination with repeatable processes for creation, review and approval of deliverables.

process.title: Paid media & optimization
process.description: Campaign management on Meta, Google and TikTok Ads, with KPI tracking and segmentation adjustments.

results.summary: A work system capable of sustaining the creative and commercial operation of dozens of active accounts at once, with clear production, approval and media processes.
